description: FRC consolidated annual macro companion series. Every value previously verified and published in FRC research pages (mortgage-correlation-research, shock-beta, hypothesis-graveyard). Single source of truth for future models.

fha_delinquency_90d_q4.source: MBA National Delinquency Survey, FHA 90+ day, Q4

sloos_net_tightening_mortgage.source: Federal Reserve SLOOS, net tightening balance, mortgage category, annual

mortgage30_annual_avg.source: Freddie Mac PMMS 30Y fixed, annual average

hpi_yoy.source: FHFA Purchase-Only HPI, YoY. Only FRC-verified years included.

cash_out_ratio.source: CFPB HMDA, cash-out share of refinance volume. Partial series (verified years only).

median_downpayment_pct.source: NAR Profile of Home Buyers and Sellers, 2025

H2_prevol_shock_response.note: pre-2022 volatility predicts 2021->2023 tightening, n=11 lenders

F08_downpayment_band_spread.note: Lender denial spread (DTI 40-46 avg, 2025 surfaces) at 20%-down band vs median-FTB 10%-down band; door choice matters ~5x more where the median first-time buyer actually lands. 90-94 band: fewer lenders meet n>=50.

F09_loan_amount_dead_zone.top_reason_flip: Below $150K the #1 denial reason is Credit history; at $150K+ it flips to Debt-to-income ratio.
F09_loan_amount_dead_zone.headline: Small-loan penalty: FHA applications under $100K were denied 46.9% of the time in 2025 - 2.5x the 18.5% rate for $400K+ loans, a perfectly monotonic gradient across 1,217,297 decisioned applications.
F09_loan_amount_dead_zone.caveat: Reflects applicant mix (thinner credit files at small balances) as well as lender small-balance economics; not a finding of impropriety.
F09_loan_amount_dead_zone.source: CFPB HMDA 2025 Snapshot, FHA loan_type 2, decisioned applications (actions 1,2,3)

F10_state_geography.headline: State spread 2x (Hawaii 29.0% to Idaho/Utah 14.8%); small-loan penalty worst in EXPENSIVE states (Idaho 3.2x, NH 53.8% small-loan denial); sub-$150K FHA market effectively vanished in HI/DC/AK (<100 decisions/year).
F10_state_geography.mechanism_note: Consistent with F09 collateral gradient: in high-cost markets, low-priced properties are the most marginal stock.

F11_reason_fingerprint.headline: DNA flip: low-denial lenders deny on math (Guild/CrossCountry/Movement ~6%: DTI ~30%, credit ~23%); highest-denial lenders deny on incomplete files (Carrington 73.5% of cited reasons, AmeriSave 41.0%, Better 30.4%) - the denial-rate leaderboard partly measures process/funnel, not strictness. Builder-lenders deny on DTI alone (Lennar 53.1%, DHI 45.3%; collateral negligible - new construction passes appraisal). Rocket's #1 reason: collateral 36.6%. Soft door travels with lender: CrossCountry 4-7% in every major state.
F11_reason_fingerprint.fairness_note: Incomplete-share is a funnel outcome observation, not negligence; codes record outcome not cause.
F11_reason_fingerprint.source: CFPB HMDA 2025, denial_reason 1-4, lenders >=500 apps & >=100 denials

disclaimer: Annual n=6-11 observations. Hypothesis-generating, not definitive. Informational only.
